title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
